description: Fix MutationObserver resource leak and JSON.parse crash in AWS Console plugin.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/aws-console && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Disconnect MutationObserver after credentials are captured, and add try-catch to classifyError JSON.parse
userStories.description: The MutationObserver watching document.body for iframes is never disconnected, running for the entire page lifetime. Also, classifyError does JSON.parse without try-catch on malformed error bodies.
acceptanceCriteria: MutationObserver is disconnected after credentials are successfully captured from an iframe
The plugin's teardown or onDeactivate hook disconnects the observer if still active
JSON.parse in classifyError is wrapped in try-catch
